channel.title: ShadowFetch News
channel.description: Late-breaking headlines across every beat — aggregated, organized, and brief-first.

item.title: Murray drops 53, Jokic nearly has 20-20-20 game
item.description: Jamal Murray scored 53 points and Nikola Jokic had 23 points, 21 rebounds and 19 assists as the Nuggets held off the Mavericks on Wednesday night.
item.author: ESPN NBA

item.title: Wolves post largest OT comeback on record
item.description: With a game-closing 15-0 run, the Timberwolves came back from 13 points down for a 110-108 victory over the Rockets on Wednesday night.
item.author: ESPN NBA

item.title: Draymond: Hated and loved Wemby's MVP case
item.description: Warriors forward Draymond Green said he both "hated" and "absolutely loved" the MVP self-promotion from Spurs center Victor Wembanyama.
item.author: ESPN NBA

item.title: Brown-led Celts hand Thunder first loss in month
item.description: Jaylen Brown scored 14 of his 31 points in a pivotal third quarter, and the Boston Celtics rallied to beat the Oklahoma City Thunder 119-109 on Wednesday night, snapping the def...
item.author: ESPN NBA

item.title: Bulls' Ivey, Smith out rest of season with injuries
item.description: The Bulls have ruled guard Jaden Ivey and forward Jalen Smith out for the remainder of the season due to injuries.
item.author: ESPN NBA

item.title: NBA votes to mull Vegas, Seattle expansion bids
item.description: The NBA's board of governors has approved a vote for the league to explore bids and applicants for expansion teams exclusively in Las Vegas and Seattle.
item.author: ESPN NBA

item.title: Brady on comeback: NFL didn't 'like that idea'
item.description: Tom Brady says he explored the possibility of coming out of retirement and returning to the NFL, adding that the league did not "like that idea very much."
item.author: ESPN Headlines

item.title: LSU lures Wade back as it fires coach McMahon
item.description: Will Wade said in a statement posted to X on Thursday that he is leaving his job as the coach at NC State to return to LSU.
item.author: ESPN Headlines

item.title: IU's Cignetti rips transfer Marsh for gold cleats
item.description: Indiana coach Curt Cignetti ripped transfer wide receiver Nick Marsh for wearing gold cleats on the first day of spring practice for the defending national champs.
item.author: ESPN Headlines

item.title: Quad God rebounds from Olympics, leads worlds
item.description: Ilia Malinin bounced back from misfiring at the Milan Cortina Olympics by leading after the short program at the figure skating world championships.
item.author: ESPN Headlines

item.title: Amputee cornhole player waives right to hearing
item.description: A professional cornhole player who's also a quadruple amputee waived his right to an extradition hearing as authorities seek to move him from Virginia to Maryland, where he face...
item.author: ESPN Headlines

item.title: QB Simpson says he's 'absolutely' 1st-round pick
item.description: Ty Simpson felt like he made a final impression at Alabama's pro day in front of NFL scouts. He believes he's 'absolutely' a lock to be a first-round pick.
item.author: ESPN Headlines

item.title: Sens' Chabot (broken arm) could miss 2 months
item.description: Senators defenseman Thomas Chabot will miss up to two months with a broken arm, coach Travis Green announced on Thursday.
item.author: ESPN Headlines

item.title: World Series of Poker returning to ESPN in July
item.description: The World Series of Poker is returning to ESPN for the first time since 2021, with coverage of this year's main event from Las Vegas beginning July 2.
item.author: ESPN Headlines

item.title: Federal Reserve urges judge to deny bid to revive Jerome Powell probe subpoenas
item.description: President Donald Trump, in his latest jibe at Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell, called him a "moron,' and blasted him over keeping interest rates too high.
item.author: CNBC Top

item.title: Fitbit’s budget-friendly Inspire 3 is $30 off, matching its best price
item.description: Amazon’s Big Spring Sale has delivered discounts on wearables like the latest Apple Watch SE 3 and Fitbit’s Charge 6. But they’re not exactly cheap even though they’re on sale....
item.author: The Verge

item.title: The Clues Binance Missed That Led to Billions in Crypto Flowing to Iran
item.description: The world’s largest crypto exchange is under fire after investigators found accounts moving $1.7 billion to entities linked to Iran. Clues about those accounts were in plain sig...
item.author: New York Times Technology

item.title: Sarah Ferguson stripped of Freedom of City of York title
item.description: The former duchess was given the honour in 1987 following her marriage to the then-Prince Andrew.
item.author: BBC News

item.title: Weekly quiz: What sneaky snack was this bird of prey seen carrying?
item.description: How much attention did you pay to what happened in the world over the past seven days?
item.author: BBC Science & Environment

item.title: Safety Experts Considered LaGuardia Challenging but Not an Outlier
item.description: Regulators, pilots and others in aviation have worried about the kind of runway accident that happened at LaGuardia Airport on Sunday.
item.author: New York Times Technology

item.title: DOJ close to finalizing deal to hand over voter roll data to DHS, sources say
item.description: DOJ plans to turn over voter data it's collecting from states to DHS for use in immigration and criminal investigations, sources say.
item.author: CBS News Latest

item.title: Venezuela's Nicolás Maduro faces judge in court
item.description: Former Venezuelan President Nicolás Maduro attended a pre-trial court hearing in New York City on Thursday as a judge weighs key issues in his case. CBS News' Lilia Luciano repo...
item.author: CBS News Latest

item.title: Bipartisan lawmakers set to unveil bill to reopen DHS, bar ICE from wearing masks
item.description: A bipartisan group of House lawmakers is poised to unveil legislation that combines funding for the Homeland Security Department (DHS) with tougher rules for federal immigration...
item.author: The Hill

item.title: Cocaine, caffeine, painkillers consumed by sharks in Bahamas, study finds
item.description: Marine biologists found detectable levels of caffeine, cocaine and the over-the-counter painkillers in the blood of 28 sharks.
item.author: CBS News Latest

item.title: Save us, Elon Musk! X could deboost foreign slop accounts ruining public discourse
item.description: There's a real problem on X right now: foreign accounts that portray themselves as American, with names like Pro Western Civilization or Proud Heritage American or White MAGA Pa...
item.author: The Hill

item.title: The Book of Mormon: Parker & Stone | 60 Minutes Archive
item.description: In 2011, Steve Kroft profiled Trey Parker and Matt Stone, creators of the musical comedy "The Book of Mormon," which this week marks 15 years on Broadway. Parker and Stone, who...
item.author: CBS News Latest

item.title: Trump envoy Witkoff reveals more details of US negotiations with Iran prior to war
item.description: President Donald Trump's envoy Steve Witkoff revealed new details Thursday about his negotiations with Iranian officials before the U.S. attacked Iran.
item.author: ABC News Top Stories

item.title: Zelensky visits Saudi Arabia after offering Ukraine's drone expertise
item.description: There is renewed urgency for Ukraine to get a drone deal done, as the US increasingly focuses on Iran.
item.author: BBC News

item.title: Judge told Maduro 'plundered' Venezuelan wealth in court battle over legal fees
item.description: A judge said the right to defence was paramount as prosecutors argued the couple should not be able to use Venezuelan funds to pay their lawyers.
item.author: BBC News

item.title: Retail Investors Growing Exposed to Bitcoin Giant Strategy’s STRC Over MSTR, Says CEO
item.description: Strategy CEO Phong Le signaled that retail investors are growing interested in its flagship preferred share relative to its common stock.
item.author: Decrypt

item.title: Trump says Iran is "begging" for deal and Witkoff confirms 15-point proposal
item.description: President Trump spoke about the Iran war at a Cabinet meeting and said Tehran is "begging" for a deal to end the conflict. CBS News' Aaron Navarro reports.
item.author: CBS News Latest

item.title: Scientists captured female sperm whales on video working together during a birth to protect the calf
item.description: Scientists have captured rare footage of a sperm whale giving birth, offering a window into the large mammals' behavior
item.author: ABC News Technology

item.title: DOJ says it erroneously relied on ICE memo justifying immigration courthouse arrests
item.description: A federal judge Thursday ordered the Trump administration to preserve all records after the Justice Department said it made a “factual error” in a case challenging the ability t...
item.author: The Hill

item.title: Xbox’s latest games showcase had Hades 2, The Expanse, and Bluey
item.description: It's a weird time for Xbox, with a big leadership shakeup that has many wondering what the future of the platform looks like, and what exactly it stands for. In the meantime, th...
item.author: The Verge

item.title: What Is Bluesky? The Decentralized Social Media Rival to Elon Musk's X
item.description: While Bluesky seems familiar on the surface, the AT protocol architecture it runs on has the potential to be revolutionary.
item.author: Decrypt

item.title: U.S. Accuses NewYork-Presbyterian of Reaching Deals That Kept Costs High
item.description: The Justice Department sued the large New York health system, saying it restricted insurance companies from offering patients cheaper options.
item.author: New York Times Technology

item.title: Snapchat Investigated in Europe Over Child Safety Policies
item.description: Regulators in Brussels accused the social media platform of maintaining a weak age-verification system, and steering younger users toward inappropriate experiences.
item.author: New York Times Technology

item.title: Kim Jong Un gifted gun after Belarus friendship treaty
item.description: Belarusian President Alexander Lukashenko gifted North Korean leader Kim Jong Un a gun.
item.author: Al Jazeera

item.title: Owner blocks 'Rainham volcano' fix, council says
item.description: Repeated fires at Arnolds Field in Launders Lane, Rainham, have plagued residents for years.
item.author: BBC Science & Environment

item.title: Iran and the U.S. harden their positions as Tehran tightens its grip on the Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Iran and the United States appeared at an impasse Thursday, with each side hardening its position over talks and setting the stage for another potential escalation in the Middle...
item.author: PBS NewsHour Headlines
